subject: [PATCH 18/24] nfsd: send basic file attributes in CB_NOTIFY

2026-04-07.patch_summary: This patch adds the ability to send basic inode information in a CB_NOTIFY event, including attributes that can be acquired via GETATTR. The patch introduces new code to handle this functionality and includes error handling for cases where the client was granted a delegation when a file was created. The changes are made to the nfsd4xdr.c file in the Linux kernel.
